# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

properties([
    parameters([
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma-separated list of artifact URLs to download'),
        string(name: 'PRODUCTION_SERVERS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma-separated list of production servers (host:port or host)'),
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/application', description: 'Deployment path on production servers'),
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: '', description: 'Credentials ID for artifact download (optional)'),
        string(name: 'SERVER_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: 'production-ssh-key', description: 'SSH credentials ID for production servers'),
        string(name: 'BACKUP_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/backups', description: 'Backup path on production servers'),
        choice(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_STRATEGY', choices: ['rolling', 'parallel', 'blue-green'], description: 'Deployment strategy'),
        booleanParam(name: 'CREATE_BACKUP', defaultValue: true, description: 'Create backup before deployment'),
        booleanParam(name: 'VERIFY_ARTIFACTS', defaultValue: true, description: 'Verify downloaded artifacts'),
        booleanParam(name: 'HEALTH_CHECK', defaultValue: true, description: 'Perform health check after deployment'),
        string(name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_URL', defaultValue: '/health', description: 'Health check endpoint'),
        string(name: 'SERVICE_NAME', defaultValue: 'application', description: 'Service name to restart'),
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_URLS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma-separated list of checksum URLs (optional)'),
        string(name: 'PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Pre-deployment script to run on servers (optional)'),
        string(name: 'POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Post-deployment script to run on servers (optional)')
    ])
])

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    environment {
        ARTIFACT_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP = sh(script: "date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S", returnStdout: true).trim()
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URLS?.trim()) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_URLS parameter is required")
                    }
                    if (!params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS?.trim()) {
                        error("PRODUCTION_SERVERS parameter is required")
                    }
                    
                    echo "Artifact URLs: ${params.ARTIFACT_URLS}"
                    echo "Production Servers: ${params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS}"
                    echo "Deploy Path: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                    echo "Deployment Strategy: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_STRATEGY}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Prepare Workspace') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "rm -rf ${ARTIFACT_DIR}"
                    sh "mkdir -p ${ARTIFACT_DIR}"
                    echo "Workspace prepared for artifact download"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactUrls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    def checksumUrls = params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_URLS ? params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM_URLS.split(',').collect { it.trim() } : []
                    
                    artifactUrls.eachWithIndex { url, index ->
                        echo "Downloading artifact ${index + 1}/${artifactUrls.size()}: ${url}"
                        
                        def fileName = url.tokenize('/').last()
                        def filePath = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${fileName}"
                        
                        if (params.ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS_ID) {
                            withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: params.ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS_ID, 
                                                             usernameVariable: 'ARTIFACT_USER', 
                                                             passwordVariable: 'ARTIFACT_PASS')]) {
                                if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                                    sh """
                                        aws s3 cp ${url} ${filePath}
                                    """
                                } else {
                                    sh """
                                        curl -u \$ARTIFACT_USER:\$ARTIFACT_PASS -L -o ${filePath} ${url}
                                    """
                                }
                            }
                        } else {
                            if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                                sh """
                                    aws s3 cp ${url} ${filePath}
                                """
                            } else {
                                sh """
                                    curl -L -o ${filePath} ${url}
                                """
                            }
                        }
                        
                        if (!fileExists(filePath)) {
                            error("Failed to download artifact from ${url}")
                        }
                        
                        echo "Successfully downloaded: ${fileName} (${sh(script: "du -h ${filePath} | cut -f1", returnStdout: true).trim()})"
                        
                        if (checksumUrls && checksumUrls.size() > index && checksumUrls[index]) {
                            def checksumUrl = checksumUrls[index]
                            echo "Downloading checksum from: ${checksumUrl}"
                            
                            def checksumFile = "${filePath}.checksum"
                            sh """
                                curl -L -o ${checksumFile} ${checksumUrl}
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Verify Artifacts') {
            when {
                expression { params.VERIFY_ARTIFACTS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactFiles = sh(script: "ls -1 ${ARTIFACT_DIR}", returnStdout: true).trim().split('\n')
                    
                    artifactFiles.each { file ->
                        if (!file.endsWith('.checksum')) {
                            def filePath = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${file}"
                            def checksumFile = "${filePath}.checksum"
                            
                            echo "Verifying artifact: ${file}"
                            
                            if (fileExists(checksumFile)) {
                                def expectedChecksum = readFile(checksumFile).trim().split()[0]
                                def actualChecksum = sh(script: "sha256sum ${filePath} | cut -d' ' -f1", returnStdout: true).trim()
                                
                                if (expectedChecksum == actualChecksum) {
                                    echo "✓ Checksum verified for ${file}"
                                } else {
                                    error("Checksum mismatch for ${file}: expected ${expectedChecksum}, got ${actualChecksum}")
                                }
                            } else {
                                echo "⚠ No checksum file found for ${file}, skipping verification"
                            }
                            
                            def fileSize = sh(script: "stat -c%s ${filePath}", returnStdout: true).trim().toLong()
                            if (fileSize == 0) {
                                error("Artifact ${file} is empty")
                            }
                            
                            echo "Artifact size: ${fileSize} bytes"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    def artifactFiles = sh(script: "find ${ARTIFACT_DIR} -type f ! -name '*.checksum'", returnStdout: true).trim().split('\n')
                    
                    if (params.DEPLOYMENT_STRATEGY == 'parallel') {
                        deployParallel(servers, artifactFiles)
                    } else if (params.DEPLOYMENT_STRATEGY == 'rolling') {
                        deployRolling(servers, artifactFiles)
                    } else if (params.DEPLOYMENT_STRATEGY == 'blue-green') {
                        deployBlueGreen(servers, artifactFiles)
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Post-Deployment Verification') {
            when {
                expression { params.HEALTH_CHECK }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    
                    servers.each { server ->
                        echo "Running health check on ${server}"
                        
                        def serverHost = server.contains(':') ? server.split(':')[0] : server
                        def serverPort = server.contains(':') ? server.split(':')[1] : '8080'
                        
                        retry(3) {
                            sleep(5)
                            def healthCheckUrl = "http://${serverHost}:${serverPort}${params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL}"
                            def response = sh(script: "curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' ${healthCheckUrl}", returnStdout: true).trim()
                            
                            if (response == '200') {
                                echo "✓ Health check passed for ${server}"
                            } else {
                                error("Health check failed for ${server}: HTTP ${response}")
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            echo "Deployment completed successfully to all servers"
            script {
                sh "rm -rf ${ARTIFACT_DIR}"
            }
        }
        failure {
            echo "Deployment failed. Check logs for details."
            script {
                if (params.CREATE_BACKUP) {
                    echo "Backups are available at ${params.BACKUP_PATH} on production servers"
                }
            }
        }
        always {
            script {
                def duration = currentBuild.duration / 1000
                echo "Total deployment time: ${duration} seconds"
            }
        }
    }
}

def deployParallel(servers, artifactFiles) {
    def deploySteps = [:]
    
    servers.each { server ->
        deploySteps[server] = {
            deployToServer(server, artifactFiles)
        }
    }
    
    parallel deploySteps
}

def deployRolling(servers, artifactFiles) {
    servers.each { server ->
        stage("Deploy to ${server}") {
            deployToServer(server, artifactFiles)
            
            if (params.HEALTH_CHECK) {
                echo "Waiting for ${server} to stabilize before continuing..."
                sleep(10)
            }
        }
    }
}

def deployBlueGreen(servers, artifactFiles) {
    def blueServers = []
    def greenServers = []
    
    servers.eachWithIndex { server, index ->
        if (index % 2 == 0) {
            blueServers.add(server)
        } else {
            greenServers.add(server)
        }
    }
    
    stage('Deploy to Blue Environment') {
        def blueSteps = [:]
        blueServers.each { server ->
            blueSteps[server] = {
                deployToServer(server, artifactFiles)
            }
        }
        parallel blueSteps
    }
    
    stage('Verify Blue Environment') {
        if (params.HEALTH_CHECK) {
            blueServers.each { server ->
                verifyServerHealth(server)
            }
        }
    }
    
    stage('Deploy to Green Environment') {
        def greenSteps = [:]
        greenServers.each { server ->
            greenSteps[server] = {
                deployToServer(server, artifactFiles)
            }
        }
        parallel greenSteps
    }
    
    stage('Verify Green Environment') {
        if (params.HEALTH_CHECK) {
            greenServers.each { server ->
                verifyServerHealth(server)
            }
        }
    }
}

def deployToServer(server, artifactFiles) {
    def serverHost = server.contains(':') ? server.split(':')[0] : server
    
    sshagent([params.SERVER_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
        if (params.CREATE_BACKUP) {
            echo "Creating backup on ${server}"
            sh """
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${serverHost} '
                    mkdir -p ${params.BACKUP_PATH}
                    if [ -d ${params.DEPLOY_PATH} ]; then
                        tar -czf ${params.BACKUP_PATH}/backup_${DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP}.tar.gz -C ${params.DEPLOY_PATH} . 2>/dev/null || true
                        echo "Backup created: ${params.BACKUP_PATH}/backup_${DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP}.tar.gz"
                    fi
                '
            """
        }
        
        if (params.PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT) {
            echo "Running pre-deployment script on ${server}"
            sh """
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${serverHost} '${params.PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT}'
            """
        }
        
        echo "Stopping service on ${server}"
        sh """
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${serverHost} '
                if command -v systemctl &> /dev/null; then
                    sudo systemctl stop ${params.SERVICE_NAME} 2>/dev/null || true
                elif command -v service &> /dev/null; then
                    sudo service ${params.SERVICE_NAME} stop 2>/dev/null || true
                else
                    echo "No service manager found, skipping service stop"
                fi
            '
        """
        
        echo "Creating deployment directory on ${server}"
        sh """
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${serverHost} 'mkdir -p ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}'
        """
        
        artifactFiles.each { artifactPath ->
            def fileName = artifactPath.tokenize('/').last()
            echo "Copying ${fileName} to ${server}"
            
            sh """
                scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${artifactPath} ${serverHost}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/
            """
        }
        
        echo "Extracting artifacts on ${server}"
        sh """
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${serverHost} '
                cd ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}
                for file in *.tar.gz *.zip *.jar *.war; do
                    if [ -f "\$file" ]; then
                        case "\$file" in
                            *.tar.gz)
                                tar -xzf "\$file"
                                ;;
                            *.zip)
                                unzip -o "\$file"
                                ;;
                            *.jar|*.war)
                                echo "Binary file \$file, no extraction needed"
                                ;;
                        esac
                    fi
                done
            '
        """
        
        if (params.POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT) {
            echo "Running post-deployment script on ${server}"
            sh """
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${serverHost} '${params.POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT}'
            """
        }
        
        echo "Starting service on ${server}"
        sh """
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${serverHost} '
                if command -v systemctl &> /dev/null; then
                    sudo systemctl start ${params.SERVICE_NAME}
                    sudo systemctl status ${params.SERVICE_NAME}
                elif command -v service &> /dev/null; then
                    sudo service ${params.SERVICE_NAME} start
                    sudo service ${params.SERVICE_NAME} status
                else
                    echo "No service manager found, skipping service start"
                fi
            '
        """
        
        echo "✓ Deployment completed on ${server}"
    }
}

def verifyServerHealth(server) {
    def serverHost = server.contains(':') ? server.split(':')[0] : server
    def serverPort = server.contains(':') ? server.split(':')[1] : '8080'
    
    retry(5) {
        sleep(5)
        def healthCheckUrl = "http://${serverHost}:${serverPort}${params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL}"
        def response = sh(script: "curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' ${healthCheckUrl}", returnStdout: true).trim()
        
        if (response != '200') {
            error("Health check failed for ${server}: HTTP ${response}")
        }
    }
    
    echo "✓ Health check passed for ${server}"
}
